Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties LLC is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eddy Ferry Djaja is present.
Attorney Denise Mingrone representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Michael Lee, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of April 8, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
